text.title: AI-Assisted Persona Building (Two-Pass) Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed when applying ai-assisted-persona-building. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Personas published with no quote grounding; stakeholders dismiss.
antipattern.fix: Require quote per claim; reject ungrounded personas.

antipattern.symptom: Sole reviewer biases personas to their team's beliefs.
Personas baked into PRDs 2 years; product diverges from users.
antipattern.fix: Track open questions; revisit personas quarterly.
